spec_match.rationale: Excellent coverage of multiple PI targets: xml-stylesheet associations, custom config elements, and live HTML parsing tests.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive tabs: lets the user swap modes, extract PIs live, inject custom targets, parse custom markup, and inspect colorized syntax trees.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the parent index.html description about xml stylesheet compatibility.

edge_cases.rationale: Severe DOM injection vulnerability in custom PI renderer. The renderCPIList function on lines 384-392 interpolates raw target/data inputs directly into innerHTML, exposing XSS vectors. In addition, the custom esc() function on line 396 doesn't escape single quotes.

references.rationale: Successfully references the official ChromeStatus tracking entry.

design_system.rationale: Stellar visuals matching standard repository layout guidelines, using styled tabs, custom grids, and colorized tags.

openQuestions.title: Sanitize Custom PI and esc inputs
openQuestions.detail: Escape target and data properties in renderCPIList (lines 384-392) before adding them to innerHTML. Additionally, update the esc() function on line 396 to escape single quotes '\'' (to ') to satisfy safety standards.
